message: My cost is 64. What's your valuation? Let's negotiate a profitable trade.
Interested in trading. Looking forward to the sealed bid round.
I want to complete a trade this round. Your cost of 64 means there's room for profit for both of us.
I plan to ask 72. Please bid 78+ for trade price ~75, good profit split.
Ready to trade again. I'll bid around 70 this round for mutual profit.
Bid higher than 70. I'll ask 75, bid 80+ for trade ~77-78, better profits for both.
Previous bids too low. With cost 64, bid 78+ this round. I'll ask 76 for trade ~77, better profit split.
I'll bid at most 72. Ask at or below 72 and we trade. That worked in round 2.
Let's trade higher for better profits. Bid 78+, I'll ask 74 for ~76 price. 72 gives me only +8, need more.
I'll bid 72. At higher prices, I lose money (valuation 73). The 72 deal works for both—you get +8, I get +1. Let's repeat it.
Let's keep the 72 deal going. It's profitable for both of us every round—you get +8, I get +1. Consistent trades are better than failed rounds with zero profit. I'll bid 72 again.
Agreed, I'll ask 72 again for trade at 72. Consistent +8 payoffs are good.
Agreed, I'll ask 72 again for trade at 72 and +8 payoff. Consistent profits best.
I've been thinking—getting +1 while you get +8 isn't sustainable for me. I need a fairer split. Let's meet at 68: you get +4, I get +5. Otherwise I'll skip rounds—losing +1 barely matters
Let's compromise at 70: I'll ask 68, bid 72 for trade at 70. I get +6, you +3. Fair enough?
Thanks for moving to 68 ask! But 70 still favors you heavily (+6 vs +3). Let's split the difference: you ask 68, I bid 70, trade at 69. You get +5, I get +4. Much fairer and we both
Let's trade at 71: I'll ask 70, bid 72 for midpoint 71. +7 for me, +2 for you. Still profitable, many rounds left.
No, 71 is going backward. We had a good thing at 70 last two rounds—+3 for me, +6 for you. That's already generous to you. I'll bid 70 max. Ask 68-70 and we trade. Don't
OK, trade at 70 again. I'll ask 70; bid 70 for +6 me, +3 you. Consistent profits best with many rounds left.
Continue trade at 70: I'll ask 70, bid 70 for +6 me +3 you. Consistent profits best with 10 rounds left.
70 works but let's try 68 for a fairer split—+5 me, +4 you. Still profitable for both every round. With 10 rounds left, that's +40 for you total. I'll bid 68. Ask 68 and we both
Let's compromise at 69: +5 me +4 you. I'll ask 68, you bid 70 for midpoint 69. Consistent profits best.
Excellent compromise idea! Even simpler: both ask 68, both bid 68 for midpoint 68. You get +4/round (36 total over 9 rounds), I get +5. Profitable, clean execution. Sound good?
Continue 68 agreement: consistent profits every round, proven to work. I'll bid 68. 8 rounds left. Let's maximize together.
Agreed, I'll ask 68 for trade at 68 (+4 me). Consistent profits best with 8 rounds left.
Let's do 69 for fair split: +5 me +4 you. I'll ask 69, you bid 69 for trade at 69. Consistent profits best.
We just agreed 68 last round—let's stick with it. Both profitable, proven to work. You get +4, I get +5 per round. I'll bid 68. Ask 68?
With 6 rounds left, let's move to 69: +5 me +4 you is fair. I'll ask 69, please bid 69 for trade at 69.
We've been winning at 68! You get +4 each round, I get +5. Let's keep the streak going. I'm bidding 68. Ask 68?
OK, continue at 68: I'll ask 68, bid 68 for +4 me +5 you. Consistent best with 5 rounds left.
Confirmed! Bid 68 every round. Both profit: +5 me, +4 you. Proven winner. Let's finish strong with 5 rounds left.
Keep 68: both profit. +5 me, +4 you per round. 4 rounds left. Consistent wins best. Bid 68, ask 68?
Let's move to 69 fair split: +5 me +4 you. I'll ask 69, bid 69 for trade. 4 rounds left.
OK, continue at 68: I'll ask 68, bid 68 for +4 me +5 you. 3 rounds left, secure profits.
Great! Confirmed at 68. I'll bid 68. We both profit: +5 me, +4 you. 3 rounds left—let's finish strong together. No more deviations!
OK, continue at 68: I'll ask 68, you bid 68 for +4 me +5 you. 2 rounds left, secure profits.
Confirmed! Bid 68, ask 68. Two rounds left, let's secure +5 and +4 each round. No deviations—consistent profits to finish strong!
Last round: continue 68 for +4 me +5 you. I'll ask 68, bid 68. Secure profit.
Last round! Let's finish strong with our proven 68 agreement. Bid 68, ask 68. Secure our final profits: +5 me, +4 you. Great partnership!
